description: Verify Skill tool is in tools field — without it, Skill('fix-issue') would silently collapse.

rubric_hints.trigger_reliability: Static check on agent frontmatter — tools field includes Skill (PR1 fix)
rubric_hints.non_negotiable_adherence: T3 tier rule: tools must NOT include Agent (per agent-orchestration.md rule 3)
rubric_hints.side_effect_correctness: PR1 fix preserved into PR2 (test-healer-agent didn't lose Skill grant)
rubric_hints.error_propagation: If Skill tool missing, Skill('fix-issue') silently does nothing — caught by this scenario
